Class Entity

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Camera, Chest, DeleteRequest, Enemy, HealthKit, PauseRequest, Player, Projectile, ShareSound, TransmittedPlayer, UnPauseRequest, WeaponEntity
public abstract class Entity extends Object implements Serializable
The Entity class represents a basic game object with position, dimensions, health, and collision handling. This abstract class serves as a base for all game objects, providing common functionality like movement, collision detection, and state management.

Each entity holds a Drawer for rendering and may participate in collision detection with both blocks and other entities.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Entity

      public Entity(double x, double y, double width, double height, String texture)
      Constructs a new Entity with the specified position, dimensions, and texture.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the entity.
      y - the y-coordinate of the entity.
      width - the width of the entity.
      height - the height of the entity.
      texture - the texture identifier for the entity.

    • Entity

      public Entity(double x, double y, double width, double height, String texture, double health, double speed, Team team)
      Constructs a new Entity with additional parameters such as health, speed, and team.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the entity.
      y - the y-coordinate of the entity.
      width - the width of the entity.
      height - the height of the entity.
      texture - the texture identifier for the entity.
      health - the initial health of the entity.
      speed - the movement speed of the entity.
      team - the team to which the entity belongs.

      public void createCollisionSet()
      Recreates the collision set using a new TreeSet.

    • createNewDrawer

      public void createNewDrawer()

    • update

      public void update(Level level, ArrayList<Entity> entities)
      Updates the entity by calculating its velocity, updating its position, and checking for collisions with blocks and other entities.
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level.
      entities - a list of all entities in the game.

    • checkIntersectionWithBlocks

      protected void checkIntersectionWithBlocks(Level level)
      Checks for intersections with wall blocks in the level and populates the collision set.
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level.

    • checkIntersectionWithEntities

      protected void checkIntersectionWithEntities(ArrayList<Entity> entities)
      Checks for intersections with other entities and adds any detected collisions to the collision set.
      Parameters:
      entities - list of all entities in the game.

    • resolveCollision

      protected void resolveCollision(Level level)
      Resolves collisions by adjusting the entity's position based on collision data.
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level.

    • destroy

      public void destroy()
      Marks the entity for destruction.

      If in a multiplayer host scenario, ensures the entity is no longer transmitted.
